name: tao-skill-bank
description: NVIDIA TAO skill bank with generated capability discovery for application workflows, model actions, data utilities, AutoML, and platform execution.

interface.shortDescription: TAO app workflows, model actions, and AutoML
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that reads packaged TAO manifests and helper scripts to answer capability questions and route workflow requests. The plugin exposes only small helper/router skills from ./skills/; canonical model, data, platform, and application skills live once under their layer directories. Intro and capability answers are generated by scripts/list_tao_capabilities.py rather than hard-coded in plugin metadata.
defaultPrompt: What can the TAO Skill Bank do?
Choose and run a TAO workflow for my dataset.
List TAO models, actions, AutoML, and platforms.
